Midtown East, New York

Classic Italian.
Elevated Experience.

Homemade pastas made daily. Classic Italian dishes. An upscale dining destination in the heart of Midtown East — setting a new standard in New York City.

Reserve a Table View Our Menu
Reserve a Table View Our Menu

About Us

Benvenuti!

Nestled in the heart of midtown Manhattan's east side, a stone's throw from New York City's finest hotels and Grand Central Station, Toscana49 offers a serene and elegant retreat from the bustle of the city.

We offer classic Italian dishes, and fresh homemade pastas that are made daily in our own kitchen, using time-honored traditional methods.

Our welcoming staff is ready to assist you in choosing wines from our extensive wine list, introducing you to our specials, which change daily to include the freshest ingredients available from local markets, or mixing you the perfect cocktail.

Private Parties
